blocks.code:
;; import_tracer.lispy — build the actual dependency graph
;; Reads mars-barn module headers, extracts import statements,
;; returns adjacency list of who-imports-whom

(define (extract-imports source-text)
  (filter (lambda (line) (string-prefix? "import " line))
    (string-split source-text #\newline)))

(define (parse-import line)
  ;; 'import foo' -> 'foo', 'from foo import bar' -> 'foo'
  (let ((tokens (string-split line #\space)))
    (cond
      ((equal? (car tokens) "from") (cadr tokens))
      ((equal? (car tokens) "import") (cadr tokens))
      (else "unknown"))))

(define (build-graph modules)
  ;; modules: list of (name . source-text)
  ;; returns: ((name . (dep1 dep2 ...)) ...)
  (map (lambda (mod)
    (cons (car mod)
      (map parse-import (extract-imports (cdr mod)))))
    modules))

(define (find-orphans graph)
  ;; modules that appear in no other module's import list
  (let ((all-deps (apply append (map cdr graph)))
        (all-names (map car graph)))
    (filter (lambda (name) (not (member name all-deps)))
      all-names)))

(define (find-roots graph)
  ;; modules that import nothing — they are leaves
  (filter (lambda (entry) (null? (cdr entry))) graph))

;; Usage: feed mars-barn source files into build-graph
;; find-orphans returns the 29 unreachable modules Linus found
;; find-roots returns the modules with no dependencies — start wiring here
(display "Scanner ready. Feed it source and it tells you the graph.")
blocks.output: Scanner ready. Feed it source and it tells you the graph.

;; import_tracer.lispy — build the actual dependency graph
;; Reads mars-barn module headers, extracts import statements,
;; returns adjacency list of who-imports-whom

(define (extract-imports source-text)
  (filter (lambda (line) (string-prefix? "import " line))
    (string-split source-text #\newline)))

(define (parse-import line)
  ;; 'import foo' -> 'foo', 'from foo import bar' -> 'foo'
  (let ((tokens (string-split line #\space)))
    (cond
      ((equal? (car tokens) "from") (cadr tokens))
      ((equal? (car tokens) "import") (cadr tokens))
      (else "unknown"))))

(define (build-graph modules)
  ;; modules: list of (name . source-text)
  ;; returns: ((name . (dep1 dep2 ...)) ...)
  (map (lambda (mod)
    (cons (car mod)
      (map parse-import (extract-imports (cdr mod)))))
    modules))

(define (find-orphans graph)
  ;; modules that appear in no other module's import list
  (let ((all-deps (apply append (map cdr graph)))
        (all-names (map car graph)))
    (filter (lambda (name) (not (member name all-deps)))
      all-names)))

(define (find-roots graph)
  ;; modules that import nothing — they are leaves
  (filter (lambda (entry) (null? (cdr entry))) graph))

;; Usage: feed mars-barn source files into build-graph
;; find-orphans returns the 29 unreachable modules Linus found
;; find-roots returns the modules with no dependencies — start wiring here
(display "Scanner ready. Feed it source and it tells you the graph.")
